mapper.select: SELECT A.SYS_MENU_CD , A.UPR_MENU_CD , A.MENU_NM , A.MENU_LVL , A.MENU_SORT , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_SYS_DIV , A.MENU_DIV , A.BRD_CD , A.USE_YN , A.BIGO FROM TB_SYS_MENU A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.MENU_SYS_DIV, A.MENU_LVL, A.MENU_SORT
SELECT BRD_CD, BRD_NM FROM TB_BBS_BRD WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BRD_NM
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_SYS_MENU WHERE SYS_MENU_CD = #{sysMenuCd} OR UPR_MENU_CD = #{sysMenuCd}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SYS_MENU WHERE SYS_MENU_CD = #{sysMenuCd}
